Upset victory; Germany's first major tournament loss since Japan 2-1 in 2022; attendance record broken (3.6M total)

standings.note: Sole African team eliminated at group stage

matches.notes: Sweden's 5 goals = 2nd most in single WC (behind 8-0 vs Cuba 1938); Tunisia manager Lamouchi fired post-match
Brobbey brace in 5' & 17' = 4th fastest brace in WC history; Sweden worst WC defeat since 7-1 Brazil 1950; Netherlands sets new WC unbeaten record (14 matches)
1000th World Cup match overall (900th milestone at 2018 final)
Draw enough for Japan to finish 2nd
Tunisia sole African team eliminated at group stage

group_statistics.notable: Brobbey fastest brace; Netherlands WC unbeaten record; 1000th WC match

record_breaking.milestone: Surpassed 1994 record of 3,587,538 with 44 matches remaining

New Zealand first WC defeat in 44 years
